meaning: adj.不矫揉造作的,自然的,真挚的,未受影响的,未被感动的
examples: No area was spared or unaffected, from the foggy northern coast to the Sierra Nevada Mountains.
People's rights are unaffected by the new law.
She seemed totally unaffected by what she'd drunk.
The Post Office said that 97% of branches will be unaffected by the strike.
Seven were already in a scheduled shut down for inspection or refueling and were also unaffected.
